title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
Oil (Brent) -3.1% (24h) ~$97.04 — reverses from $100 peak; demand fears weigh
Mag 7 shed $797B Thu (worst day since Apr 2025); BTC held ~$64k — rare decoupling
EU 21st Russia sanctions: 14 crypto operators targeted incl. HTX (TRON-linked) for evasion
FOMC Jul 28-29 hike odds now ~35%; Warsh presser 29 Jul 14:30 ET
